title: Grilled Date and Xtra Skewers
description: A delicious and healthy snack or side dish made by grilling dates and xtra on skewers, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Thread a date onto each skewer, followed by a piece of xtra.
Leave a small space between each date and xtra.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the xtra is tender.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Soak the skewers in water for 30 minutes before grilling to prevent them from catching fire.
Thread the chewy onto the skewers before grilling to help keep them in place.
